title: Old Bundle UI
description: Bring back the previous bundle ui.
body:
This mod brings back the old bundle ui before Minecraft 1.21.2.

## Why not the new UI?

- It's too large.
- It does not display all items.
- It leaves blank slots at the begining, very confusing.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dSXIUZBR/images/3e4d604ba2080f42e59d92fbfe7777b52915e27b.png)
